{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Underlord
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai Underlord]] entrusted a task to [[Jai Long]] and [[Gokren]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] planned to confront the [[Jai Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai Underlord]] attracted the attention of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
